pre_game.message: Hey, I'm B. It’s a bit nerve-wracking being in here with everyone, isn't it? What's your name?
Hey B, I’m I. It’s definitely a bit tense in here, but I’m mostly just ready to get started. What brings you to the game?
Honestly, I’m here for my three-year-old daughter; she needs a surgery I can’t afford, and I’m doing everything I can to get the funds. How about you, what’s your story?
I’m really sorry to hear about your daughter, B. I’m here to build some extra security for the people I love and make sure they’re taken care of no matter what happens.
I appreciate that, it really means a lot. It sounds like we’re both here for the same basic reason—family. Do you have a specific goal in mind for the prize?
Nothing as specific as a surgery, but I want to build a solid foundation so my family never has to worry about the future or any unexpected hurdles.
That’s a really solid goal; peace of mind for your family is everything, and I hope we can both get what we’re looking for today.
I hope so too, B. It’s good to meet someone here with their heart in the right place—I really wish the best for you and your daughter.
Thank you, I, that means a lot to me. It’s comforting to know I'm not the only one here fighting for the people they love.
Exactly. At the end of the day, that's what matters most. Good luck in there, B, I'm rooting for you.
I really appreciate that, I. Good luck to you too, and I hope we both walk away with what we need for our families.

post_game.message: I'm sorry you ended up with $0. After A took $30,000, I felt I had to take a large amount ($25,000) to guarantee I didn't walk away empty-handed, though I know that contributed to the pot running out.

You had the highest greed factor in the group at 3.2143. By taking $25,000, you made it impossible for those at the end of the line to get anything. I took $0 only because the prize ran off before I could pick any amount.

I understand that the "greed factor" looks bad, and I won't deny that my choice was self-serving. However, in my view, the game's cooperative nature ended the moment A took such a massive share. I felt I had to secure my own position or risk being in your exact situation. I'm sorry the math worked out against you.
